sqlCommands.descr: update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Amt1, Amt2) (Select '[batchID]-data2' as KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, ProdCode, PTF, round(sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, round(sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC,ProdCode,PTF)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, PC, Amt2, Flex1) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, substring(GL,3,1), substring(PC,1,6), round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, 'pass1' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' group by substring(GL,3,1),substring(PC,1,6))
update TransX set Amt2 = 1 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = '550000' and GL = '6'
update TransX set Amt2 = -1 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = '550000' and GL = '5'
update TransX set GLdesc = (case when Amt2 >= 0 then 150 else 210 end) + GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Amt1, Amt2,Assgnmt) (Select y.KeyID, x.Co, y.GLdesc + substring(x.GL,4,4), x.Crcy, '877' as TTY, x.TP, x.PC, x.ProdCode, x.PTF, x.Amt1, x.Amt2,x.GL from TransX x inner join TransX y on substring(x.PC,1,6) = y.PC and substring(x.GL,3,1) = y.GL and x.KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and y.KeyID = '[batchID]' where substring(x.GL,1,3) <> y.GLdesc)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Crcy is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Amt1, Amt2,Assgnmt) (Select KeyID, Co, Assgnmt, Crcy, TTY, TP, PC, ProdCode, PTF, round(-Amt1,2), round(-Amt2,2),Assgnmt from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, ProdCode, PTF, TTY, TP, Assgnmt, Amt1, Amt2, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, ProdCode, PTF, TTY, TP, Assgnmt, (case when Amt1 > 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 > 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, ProdCode, PTF, TTY, TP, Assgnmt, Amt1, Amt2, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, ProdCode, PTF, TTY, TP, Assgnmt, (case when Amt1 < 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 < 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update TransX set Txt = 'IFRS-17 asset-liab reclass', SubProd = 'G27' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex2 = m.Name from TransX t inner join MapKeys m on t.Flex1 = m.MapKey where KeyID = '[batchID]'
insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,GLDesc,Flex1,Flex2) (Select '[batchID]',Odyssey_GL,SAP_Description,French_GL,French_Description from [Paris9002].dbo.[MapGLflip])
insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,GLDesc,Flex1,Flex2) (Select '[batchID]-data2',Odyssey_GL,SAP_Description,French_GL,French_Description from [Paris9002].dbo.[MapGL])
insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,GLDesc,Flex1,Flex2) (Select '[batchID]-data3',Odyssey_GL,SAP_Description,French_GL,French_Description from [Paris9002].dbo.[MapCededGL])
insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Flex2,GLDesc) (Select '[batchID]-data4',GL,Name,Descr from COAZ)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4, Amt5, Flex1) (select KeyID, Co, GL, round(sum(coalesce(Amt2,0))-sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, round(sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2, round(sum(coalesce(Amt4,0))-sum(coalesce(Amt3,0)),2) as Amt3, round(sum(coalesce(Amt4,0)),2) as Amt4, round(sum(coalesce(Amt5,0)),2) as Amt5, 'pass1' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID,Co,GL)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0 and Amt4 = 0 and Amt5 = 0
update TransX set Flex1 = MapKey from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (MapKey like 'M1-3-6-06-04-%' or MapKey like 'M1-3-6-06-05-%')
update TransX set Flex1 = MapKey from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and MapKey = 'M3-3-6-06-C'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = 'pass1'
Delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('2004','2005','9005') and not substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LS-SING'
Delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('2006','9006') and not substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-CAD '
Delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('2310','9231') and not substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-HUDC'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4, Amt5, Flex1) (select KeyID, Co, GL, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4, Amt5, 'M2-3-6-06-04-01' as Flex1 from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and MapKey = 'M2-3-6-06-04-01' )
Delete from [stm-dbdev-17].[FX_Recon].dbo.s2eFLEXT00
